headline: Sam's Club just made a big move Costco won't consider
summary: In the warehouse club space, there are two main competitors — Costco and Sam's Club. Sure, BJ's Wholesale Club remains a significant player. But the biggest battle continues to be between Costco and Sam's Club. Both retailers have built loyal followings by offering members access to bulk ...

headline: This 29-year-old is training to be a flight surgeon and has nearly $1.2 million invested
summary: After completing a medical residency in Anchorage, Alaska, Eric Chan will begin a three-year service committment in the Air Force.

headline: I earn $160,000 a year in Alaska–I’ve saved over $1 million
summary: Eric Chan is a third-year family medicine resident at Providence Alaska Medical Center in Anchorage. At the end of his residency, he'll be entering the U.S. Air Force to train as a flight doctor. Through his doctor's salary and stipends from the military, he earns $160,000 a year. He also has $1.2 million in savings and investments, which he's amassed in part by setting aside half of his income over the past few years.

headline: Costco (COST) Faces Slower Warehouse Traffic As Membership Growth Questions Build
summary: Costco Wholesale reported a clear slowdown in worldwide warehouse traffic growth in its most recent quarter. The moderation in shopper visits comes while the company continues to open new warehouses and maintain high executive membership penetration. This shift contrasts with the consistently strong traffic trends that have supported Costco's premium valuation in the past. For investors tracking Costco Wholesale, the traffic slowdown is emerging just as the stock trades around $961.09 under...

headline: AI capex under-investment is a bigger risk than saturation: Dan Newman
summary: Daniel Newman of The Futurum Group compares Micron’s Q3 earnings print to Nvidia’s performance in 2023-2024. Newman says underinvesting in AI can pose a greater risk than overinvesting. He believes AI-driven demand and market rally seem sustainable, with The Futurum Group projecting AI capital expenditure to reach $5.7 trillion in 2035.
